title: The Best Amazon Prime Day Headphone Deals for Every Kind of Listener
author: Chris Haslam
text: Amazon Prime Day June 2026Absolute Best Amazon Prime Day DealsApple Watch DealsHeadphones DealsNow ReadingMesh Wi-Fi Router DealsOura Ring DealsVacuum Cleaner DealsBeauty Tech DealsWalmart DealsDeals on Power BanksSmart Bird Feeder DealsDeals Under $30Action Camera DealsAll products featured on WIRED are independently selected by our editors. However, we may receive compensation from retailers and/or from purchases of products through these links. Learn more.looking for new noise-canceling cans for your summer vacation, earbuds for the gym, or luxury designs to take the edge off your commute? These Prime Day headphone deals are for you. AmazonŌĆÖs annual sales bonanza always delivers on audio deals, but to make life easier, weŌĆÖve curated the best Prime Day headphone deals with the lowest prices, and only recommend products our experts have tried and tested themselves.Also be sure to browse our roundups of the Absolute Best Prime Day Deals and the Best Prime Day Tech Deals, or dip into our Amazon Prime Day live blog for real-time updates.Updated 6 am ET, June 24: We've added the Apple AirPods Max 2 and Bose Ultra Open Earbuds.Deals on HeadphonesPhotograph: Ryan WaniataSonyWH-1000XM6$460 $378 (18% off) Amazon$458 $389 (15% off) Walmart$458 $428 (7% off) Best BuyIt will be a while before you see SonyŌĆÖs shiny new $650 1000X The Collexion discounted, but donŌĆÖt worry, because the on-sale Sony WH-1000XM6 remain one of the finest noise-canceling headphones ever. TheyŌĆÖre our favorite headphones for blocking out even the most disruptive background noise, while also offering superb audio performance no matter which genre of music youŌĆÖre listening to.Photograph: Parker HallPhotograph: Parker HallPhotograph: Parker HallNothingHeadphone (1)$299 $214 (28% off) AmazonMost PopularGearThe 129 Absolute Best Prime Day DealsBy Louryn StrampeHow To and Advice28 Tips to Take Your ChatGPT Prompts to the Next LevelBy David NieldGearThe Best Prime Day Tech Deals on the Gadgets You Actually WantBy Simon HillGearThe 15 Best Apple Deals to Snag During Amazon Prime DayBy Louryn StrampeA cheaper, poppier follow-up to NothingŌĆÖs superb Headphone (1), these stylish noise-canceling headphones look great and boast a full-bodied sound profile thatŌĆÖs perfect for pop and electronic music. ThereŌĆÖs a slick app for adjusting sound profiles, battery life can hit 135 hours with ANC off, and thereŌĆÖs even USB-C audio cable included for hi-res listening.Photograph: Adrienne SoPhotograph: Adrienne SoPhotograph: Adrienne SoPhotograph: Adrienne SoAppleAirPods Max 2$549 $399 (27% off) Amazon$530 Walmart$530 AppleWith the same gorgeous, comfortable, iconic design as its predecessor, AppleŌĆÖs AirPods Max 2 bring improved noise canceling and Bluetooth connectivity. Apple also upgraded software features, like gesture controls and Adaptive Audio. TheyŌĆÖre a bit pricey at the RRP, but this discount is decent for Apple fans.Photograph: Ryan WaniataBoseQuietComfort Ultra$449 $269 (40% off) Amazon$449 $379 (16% off) BoseMost PopularGearThe 129 Absolute Best Prime Day DealsBy Louryn StrampeHow To and Advice28 Tips to Take Your ChatGPT Prompts to the Next LevelBy David NieldGearThe Best Prime Day Tech Deals on the Gadgets You Actually WantBy Simon HillGearThe 15 Best Apple Deals to Snag During Amazon Prime DayBy Louryn StrampeItŌĆÖs a testament to the quality of the Bose QuietComfort Ultra that they remain one of the best buys despite being over two years old. TheyŌĆÖre supremely comfortable and have impressive spatialized audio, and because theyŌĆÖre Bose, they come with sensationally good, customizable noise cancellation technology.Earbud DealsPhotograph: Parker HallReview: Apple AirPods Pro 3Review: Apple AirPods Pro 3AppleAirPods Pro 3$249 $179 (28% off) Amazon$250 $180 (28% off) Best Buy$249 AppleIf youŌĆÖre wedded to the Apple ecosystem and live for seamless integration and instant pairing, the AirPods Pro 3 are the best wireless earbuds for you, especially when theyŌĆÖre on sale. The latest generation has up to eight hours of battery, ANC is twice as good, and thereŌĆÖs also heart-rate sensing, workout tracking, and translation.Photograph: Parker HallNothingEar (a)$79 $53 (33% off) Amazon$99 $56 (43% off) NothingMost PopularGearThe 129 Absolute Best Prime Day DealsBy Louryn StrampeHow To and Advice28 Tips to Take Your ChatGPT Prompts to the Next LevelBy David NieldGearThe Best Prime Day Tech Deals on the Gadgets You Actually WantBy Simon HillGearThe 15 Best Apple Deals to Snag During Amazon Prime DayBy Louryn StrampeBetter looking than the AirPods theyŌĆÖre aping, NothingŌĆÖs transparent little buds are a great buy, even at twice the price. The 11 millimeter dynamic drivers boast an open, natural midrange thatŌĆÖs impossible not to enjoy, while ANC delivers quiet better than most budget options. Sound quality wonŌĆÖt worry Sony or Bowers & Wilkins, but theyŌĆÖre a classy design with great fit, intuitive stem controls, app EQ, and fast pairing.Photograph: Julian ChokkattuPhotograph: Parker HallPhotograph: Parker HallGooglePixel Buds Pro 2$229 $161 (30% off) Amazon$229 Best Buy$229 GoogleThe most comfortable non-stem earbuds this reviewer has ever used, with a tiny case as pocketable as AirPods. Google updated the software back in 2025 to add adaptive audio, protection against loud noise, improved Gemini integration and head gesture control thatŌĆÖs not as silly as it sounds. A classy choice with the best integration for Android users.Photograph: Ryan WaniataBoseUltra Open Earbuds$299 $199 (33% off) Amazon$299 $199 (33% off) Bose$299 $199 (33% off) Adorama$299 $199 (33% off) Best BuyMost PopularGearThe 129 Absolute Best Prime Day DealsBy Louryn StrampeHow To and Advice28 Tips to Take Your ChatGPT Prompts to the Next LevelBy David NieldGearThe Best Prime Day Tech Deals on the Gadgets You Actually WantBy Simon HillGearThe 15 Best Apple Deals to Snag During Amazon Prime DayBy Louryn StrampeThe best-sounding open earbuds offer crystal clear audio and plenty of instrumental detail. The rollable build delivers a secure fit with minimal discomfort, though it can take a few tries to attach them correctly. Battery life is around seven and a half hours, and they have an IPX4 rating, meaning theyŌĆÖre resistant to splashes and light rain. You also get advanced Bose features like multipoint pairing and Bose Spatial Audio.Deals on Sport HeadphonesPhotograph: Ryan WaniataBeatsPowerbeats Pro 2$250 $180 (28% off) Amazon$249 $180 (28% off) Walmart$250 AppleFeaturing the same H2 chip that powers the AirPods Pro 2, the PowerBeats Pro 2 impressed our reviewer, who praised the ŌĆ£crazy comfyŌĆØ fit and dynamic sound. ThereŌĆÖs also ANC and transparency modes for both road safety and gym sanity, wireless charging, IP57 durability, full-on bass-forward audio quality, and built-in heart rate monitoring.Read nextRead nextUpgrade Your Wi-Fi With This Prime Day Mesh Deal
